text: Now let me look at all the evidence carefully.

function.name: make_decision
function.arguments: {"chosen_move": "investigate", "action_id": "ask_guard_radio", "prior_adjustment_log_odds": -0.3, "adjustment_reasons": ["n=0 means hand-set prior with no data weight — free to adjust", "geofence exit from guard device with background:true — likely routine movement, not malicious", "zero precedents at this site — no local pattern to reinforce the prior"], "novelty_flag": true, "confidence_p_real": 0.33, "what_would_change_my_mind": "If the guard does not respond or gives an evasive answer, that would raise suspicion. If the guard confirms they stepped out for a legitimate reason (patrol route, escort), I'd suppress. If they don't acknowledge and the geofence alarm persists, escalate.\""}
